title: Good News | Tianhui Group was awarded the honorary title of "Excellent Supplier" by Hongyue Group
contentHtml:
At the beginning of the new year, on January 7, relying on its good cooperative relationship, Tianhui Group was awarded the honorary title of "Excellent Supplier" by Qinhuangdao Hongyue Plastic Group.
From the initial consensus to sincere cooperation, Tianhui Group and Hongyue Group have been working together for more than ten years. We thank Hongyue Group for its support and trust in Tianhui Group. We also wish Qinhuangdao Hongyue, Hubei Hongyue, and Guangzhou Hongyue better and better, and their careers will reach a higher level.

Tianhui Group will use a more confident attitude, base itself on the present, focus on the long term, consolidate the cornerstone of Tianhui's business development with first-class quality levels, and meet the challenges of the market with a new spiritual outlook. Tianhui Group will not forget its original intention and join hands with Hongyue Group to win a better future.
titleZh: 喜讯|天晖集团获评宏岳集团 “优秀供应商”荣誉称号
contentHtmlZh:
新年伊始，1月7日，凭借着一直以来良好的合作关系，天晖集团获评秦皇岛市宏岳塑胶集团“优秀供应商”荣誉称号。
从初步达成共识到竭诚合作,天晖集团与宏岳集团已经携手走过十余年,感谢宏岳集团对天晖集团的支持与信赖，同时祝愿秦皇岛宏岳、湖北宏岳、广州宏岳越来越好，事业更上一层楼。

天晖集团会用更自信的姿态，立足当下，着眼长远，以一流的质量水平，夯实天晖事业发展的基石；以新的精神面貌，迎接市场的挑战。天晖集团将不忘初心携手宏岳集团共赢美好未来。
